title: Verify the welcome message and subtitle are displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the home page. | Verify the 'WELCOME' message is displayed. | Verify the subtitle 'ADD BOOKS TO YOUR LIBRARY EASILY' is displayed.
expected_result: The 'WELCOME' message is displayed. | The subtitle 'ADD BOOKS TO YOUR LIBRARY EASILY' is displayed.

title: Verify the 'MANUALLY' button is functional
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'MANUALLY' button. | Verify the app navigates to the manual book addition screen.
expected_result: The app navigates to the manual book addition screen.

title: Verify the 'AUTOMATICALLY' button is functional
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'AUTOMATICALLY' button. | Verify the app navigates to the automatic book addition screen.
expected_result: The app navigates to the automatic book addition screen.

title: Verify the 'MANUALLY' button is clickable
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'MANUALLY' button. | Verify the button is clickable.

title: Verify the 'AUTOMATICALLY' button is clickable
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'AUTOMATICALLY' button. | Verify the button is clickable.

title: Verify the 'MANUALLY' button is not clickable when the app is in the background
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'MANUALLY' button. | Put the app in the background by pressing the home button. | Verify the 'MANUALLY' button is not clickable when the app is in the background.
expected_result: The 'MANUALLY' button is not clickable when the app is in the background.

title: Verify the 'AUTOMATICALLY' button is not clickable when the app is in the background
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'AUTOMATICALLY' button. | Put the app in the background by pressing the home button. | Verify the 'AUTOMATICALLY' button is not clickable when the app is in the background.
expected_result: The 'AUTOMATICALLY' button is not clickable when the app is in the background.

title: Verify the 'MANUALLY' button is clickable when the app is in the foreground
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'MANUALLY' button. | Verify the 'MANUALLY' button is clickable when the app is in the foreground.
expected_result: The 'MANUALLY' button is clickable when the app is in the foreground.
